home.welcomeSubtitle: Kimba, jadika ne mona bimanyinu bia siantifiki bia bafamasi badi bitikijibue mu RDC.
home.searchHint: Dîna, license anyi nimero wa ordre...

placeholder.title: Bidi bilua kumpala
placeholder.candidacyBody: Kutuma dilomba ku application wa telefone kudi kulua ku mise a jour ikuabu. Udi mua kutuma dilomba ku site wa VALIDIKA.

auth.loginSubtitle: Bwela mu compte wenu wa VALIDIKA
auth.registerSubtitle: Disangisha ne VALIDIKA mu bisekonda bikese
auth.name: Dîna dijima
auth.passwordHint: Miaku 12 pa kabuipi, ne majuscule, minuscule, chiffre ne symbole
auth.verifyEmailSubtitle: Bueja code wa bimba 6 wakutumibua ku email wenu.
auth.registerSuccess: Compte wenzeka bimpe. Udi mua kubwela.

pharmacists.searchHint: Dîna, license, nimero wa ordre, tshimenga...
pharmacists.noResults: Kakuena mufamasi udi upetangana ne dikimba dienu to.

verify.title: Kujadika kua bantu bonso
verify.inputLabel: QR token, nimero wa license anyi nimero wa ordre
verify.scanInstructions: Teka QR code wa mufamasi munkatshi mua tshimba.
verify.resultNotFound: Kakuena tshintu tshiakumonika bua code eu to.
verify.resultCompromised: Bimanyinu bishipe: data kayipetangana ne signature idi ilamibua to.
verify.lastCheckedAt: Kujadika kua kumpelu ku internet dituku dia {}

account.title: Compte wanyi
account.notLoggedIn: Bwela bua kupeta profile wenu ne malomba enu.
account.logoutConfirmBody: Nebalombe bua kubwela kabidi bua kupeta compte wenu.
account.noCandidacies: Kuena mutumine dilomba nansha dimue to.

candidacy.title: Tuma dilomba
candidacy.subtitle: Disangisha ne tshibisu tshia bafamasi ba RDC mu bisekonda bikese.
candidacy.scanCta: Jadika mukanda (carte pro, diplome, tshimanyinu tshia bumuntu)
candidacy.scanSuccess: Dîna diakumbanyibua kudi mukanda ujadikibue. Mona bimpe kumpala kua kutuma.
candidacy.scanEmpty: Kakuena tshintu tshiamanyika bienzeka. Fula nayewe.
candidacy.submitSuccess: Dilomba diakutumibua bimpe! Udi mua kulonda statut wa dienu mu compte wenu.
